Serialized Form

  • Package com.irurueta.numerical

  • Package com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.Polynomial extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mPolyParams

          double[] mPolyParams
          Array containing parameters defining a polynomial. For a polynomial having the expression p(x) = a + b*x + c*x^2 + ... provided array must be [a, b, c, ...]

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.PolynomialsException extends NumericalException implements Serializable

  • Package com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.DerivativePolynomialEvaluation extends PolynomialEvaluation implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mDerivativeOrder

          int mDerivativeOrder
          Order of derivative.

        • mX

          double mX
          Point where derivative of a given order has been evaluated.

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.DirectPolynomialEvaluation extends PolynomialEvaluation implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mX

          double mX
          Point where polynomial has been evaluated.

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.IntegralIntervalPolynomialEvaluation extends PolynomialEvaluation implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mConstants

          double[] mConstants
          Constant terms of integral.

        • mEndX

          double mEndX
          End point of interval being integrated.

        • mIntegralOrder

          int mIntegralOrder
          Order of integral.

        • mStartX

          double mStartX
          Start point of interval being integrated.

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.IntegralPolynomialEvaluation extends PolynomialEvaluation implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mConstants

          double[] mConstants
          Constant terms of integral.

        • mIntegralOrder

          int mIntegralOrder
          Order of integral.

        • mX

          double mX
          Point where integral of a given order has been evaluated.

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.PolynomialEstimationException extends PolynomialsException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.PolynomialEvaluation extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • mEvaluation

          double mEvaluation
          Evaluation of polynomial at point x.

  • Package com.irurueta.numerical.robust

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.robust.InvalidSubsetRangeException extends SubsetSelectorException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.robust.InvalidSubsetSizeException extends SubsetSelectorException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.robust.NotEnoughSamplesException extends SubsetSelectorException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorException extends NumericalException implements Serializable

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.robust.SubsetSelectorException extends NumericalException implements Serializable

  • Package com.irurueta.numerical.roots

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.roots.RootEstimationException extends NumericalException implements Serializable

  • Package com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing.KalmanFilter extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • controlMatrix

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix controlMatrix
          Control matrix (B) (it is not used if there is no control).

        • cp

          int cp
          Number of control vector dimensions (control parameters).

        • dp

          int dp
          Number of state vector dimensions (dynamic parameters).

        • errorCovPost

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix errorCovPost
          Posteriori error estimate covariance matrix (P(k)): P(k)=(I-K(k)*H)*P'(k)

        • errorCovPre

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix errorCovPre
          Priori error estimate covariance matrix (P'(k)): P'(k)=A*P(k-1)*At + Q)

        • gain

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix gain
          Kalman gain matrix (K(k)): K(k)=P'(k)*Ht*inv(H*P'(k)*Ht+R)

        • measurementMatrix

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix measurementMatrix
          Measurement matrix (H).

        • measurementNoiseCov

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix measurementNoiseCov
          Measurement noise covariance matrix (R).

        • mp

          int mp
          Number of measurement vector dimensions (measure parameters).

        • processNoiseCov

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix processNoiseCov
          Process noise covariance matrix (Q).

        • statePost

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix statePost
          Corrected state (x(k)): x(k)=x'(k)+K(k)*(z(k)-H*x'(k))

        • statePre

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix statePre
          Predicted state (x'(k)): x(k)=A*x(k-1)+B*u(k)

        • temp1

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp1
          Temporary matrix 1.

        • temp2

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp2
          Temporary matrix 2.

        • temp3

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp3
          Temporary matrix 3.

        • temp4

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp4
          Temporary matrix 4.

        • temp5

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp5
          Temporary matrix 5.

        • temp6

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp6
          Temporary matrix 6.

        • temp7

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp7
          Temporary matrix 7.

        • temp8

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix temp8
          Temporary matrix 8.

        • transitionMatrix

          com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix transitionMatrix
          State transition matrix (A).

    • Class com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing.SignalProcessingException extends NumericalException implements Serializable
